subcommands.name: dump
subcommands.description: Dump one or more boilerplates to STDOUT

args.name: boilerplate
args.description: Name of the boilerplate to dump

args.name: search term
args.description: Name of the language or framework to search for

subcommands.name: root
subcommands.description: Show the directory where gibo stores its boilerplates

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Show the list of available boilerplates

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update the list of available boilerplates

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Show the current version of gibo installed
